vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is partially accurate but shows significant degradation. P3 (Pothos/Rabbit) is present. P1 (String of Nickels) is present but in decline. P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are largely obscured or in a state of systemic collapse.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Present, showing signs of leaf senescence.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss/Degradation; original specimen is no longer clearly identifiable.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present; White Rabbit anchor remains stable.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss; no distinct foliage visible.

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot; foliage is sparse and showing chlorosis/browning.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot; original mint foliage is absent or necrotic.
plant_audit.P3: Black pot; Pothos leaf is present but shows signs of edge necrosis; White Rabbit anchor is clear.
plant_audit.P4: Black pot; no viable plant matter detected.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears consistently damp/dark across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Presence of eggshell fragments in the foreground pot, indicating a nutrient intervention or soil amendment.
biome_observations.surface_anomalies: Significant accumulation of white particulate matter (likely perlite or mineral salts) on the soil surface.

temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Gradual loss of turgor in the primary Pothos leaf; browning of the peripheral leaf in P1.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: Increased darkness/shadowing; loss of structural integrity in the remaining green foliage.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of 'Stagnant Decline'. The lack of direct light and potential over-saturation of the soil has led to the loss of the Mexican Mint and Silver Guest. The Pothos is struggling with low-light adaptation, evidenced by the darkening of the leaf and loss of vitality.
anomalies: Eggshell fragments observed in P3/P4 soil area.
White particulate accumulation on soil surface.
Significant loss of plant biomass compared to registry.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is currently failing to thrive. The 'White Rabbit' anchor remains the only constant in a landscape of receding vegetation. The Pothos in the black pot is the only remaining significant specimen, though it shows clear signs of stress. The soil appears to have been amended with eggshells, perhaps as a desperate measure to provide calcium, but the lack of sufficient light is the primary driver of the observed systemic losses.
